message:
fix(aara): include is_exact flag and abstention detail in certificate digest and merge effect abstention points

aara_resource_certificate.rs:
- EffectSummary::content_hash() now includes entry.is_exact (as u8) and
  abs.detail in the digest, preventing certificates with different exactness
  or abstention details from sharing the same hash
- ResourceCertificate::new() merges effect_summary.abstention_points into
  the certificate's abstention_points list (deduplicating by equality),
  ensuring the verdict computation considers all abstention sources
- Extract CertificateHashInput struct for cleaner hash computation

resource_certificate_consumer.rs:
- Expanded consumer validation and consumption tracking

Tests: updated aara_resource_certificate_integration for new digest fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
